metadata.provenance_rule: imports append review provenance and preserve existing evidence.sources
metadata.unlabeled_inclusion_rule: append all unlabeled queue rows even when ranked below the export cutoff

current_label.rationale: Amine dehydrogenase redox chemistry is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Copper nitrite reductase performs metal-centered electron-transfer reduction chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Class II ribonucleoside-triphosphate reductase uses B12-associated radical reduction rather than the current cobalamin radical rearrangement seed, and the selected local active site lacks proximal cobalamin evidence.

current_label.rationale: Type I 3-dehydroquinate dehydratase uses Schiff-base-assisted dehydration chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Dihydrodipicolinate synthase uses lysine Schiff-base aldol condensation and cyclization chemistry rather than PLP-dependent or hydrolase seed chemistry.

current_label.rationale: Sulfite oxidase uses molybdenum-centered sulfite oxidation with heme electron transfer, outside the current heme peroxidase or oxidase seed.

The sulfite substrate initiates a nucleophilic attack on one of the oxo ligands of the Mo(VI) centre, reducing the Mo to +4. current_label.rationale: Peptidylglycine monooxygenase is copper-dependent oxygenation chemistry outside the current metal-hydrolase, heme, and flavin seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Glutamine-fructose-6-phosphate transaminase isomerizing performs amidotransfer/isomerization chemistry outside the current PLP seed.

current_label.rationale: Arsenite oxidase uses molybdenum and iron-sulfur redox chemistry outside the current flavin dehydrogenase and heme seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Aldoxime dehydratase is a heme-dependent dehydration enzyme, not a heme peroxidase/oxidase seed mechanism in the current registry.

current_label.rationale: Acyl-acyl-carrier-protein desaturase uses diiron oxidative desaturation chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.

current_label.rationale: Methionine synthase uses methylcobalamin heterolytic methyl transfer rather than adenosylcobalamin radical rearrangement in the current cobalamin seed.

current_label.rationale: Benzoylformate decarboxylase is thiamine-diphosphate-dependent decarboxylation chemistry outside the current seed fingerprint set.

current_label.rationale: Naphthalene 1,2-dioxygenase uses Rieske iron-sulfur and non-heme iron oxygenation chemistry outside the current flavin dehydrogenase seed.

current_label.rationale: (S)-hydroxynitrile lyase has an alpha/beta-hydrolase triad but performs nonhydrolytic acid-base lyase chemistry rather than Ser-His-Asp/Glu acyl hydrolysis.

mechanism_text_snippets: Although this mechanism utilises the traditional Ser-His-Asp triad of the alpha/beta-hydrolase superfamily, it proceeds via general acid/base catalysis, rather than nucleophilic attack of the serine.

current_label.rationale: Nitrogenase couples ATP hydrolysis to iron-sulfur and FeMo-co electron transfer, outside the current flavin, heme, radical-SAM, and hydrolase seeds.

current_label.rationale: 8-oxoguanine DNA glycosylase uses base-excision glycosylase and lyase chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.

mechanism_text_snippets: Lys249 attacks the DNA 8-oxoguanine substrate in a nucleophilic substitution reaction that yields enzyme bound DNA and the conjugate base of 8-oxoguanine. current_label.rationale: Quinoprotein glucose dehydrogenase uses PQQ-dependent glucose oxidation outside the current flavin, heme, cobalamin, and hydrolase seed fingerprints.

mechanism_text_snippets: Crystallographic evidence [PMID:10508152] strongly supports the direct hydride transfer from the glucose to the C5 of the PQQ cofactor. Followed by re-oxidation of the PQQ cofactor by ubiquinone.

The addition-elimination reaction comprises general base catalysed proton abstraction, followed by the formation of a covalent PQQ-substrate adduct, and oxidative elimination of the product. Followed by re-oxidation of the PQQ cofactor by ubiquinone.
Alternative mechanism in which a direct hydride transfer from the glucose to the C4 of the PQQ cofactor occurs. Followed by re-oxidation of the PQQ cofactor by ubiquinone.

current_label.rationale: Purine nucleoside phosphorylase performs phosphorolysis rather than the current hydrolase seed mechanisms.

current_label.rationale: Pyrimidine-nucleoside phosphorylase performs phosphorolysis rather than the current hydrolysis seed mechanisms.
